node.name: Royal Ontario Museum
node.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Distillery District Walk

node.name: Distillery District Walk
node.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Eataly Toronto

node.name: Eataly Toronto
node.description: Italian marketplace and restaurant in Manulife Centre. Indoor dining with fresh pasta, pizza, and espresso. Great for rainy day lunch.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Cluny Bistro

node.name: Cluny Bistro
node.description: French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Fran's Restaurant

node.name: Fran's Restaurant
node.description: Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions.
